invalidDirectory: This directory is not a valid project
deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{item}}"? This action cannot be undone.
saveConfirmMessage: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them before continuing?
fileAlreadyExists: A file with that name already exists

notifications.title: Engine
notifications.map_dirty: The current map has unsaved changes. Save to see the changes in the engine.
notifications.success_debug: Engine started in DEBUG mode with map: {{map}}, you can use ctrl + c to show collisions and ctrl + arrow or wasd to move
notifications.texture_too_large: This texture could be too large for Mac. H: {{height}}px W: {{width}}px
notifications.delete_map_warning: Deleting a tile map that is being used can cause errors
notifications.rename_map_warning: Renaming a tile map that is being used can cause errors

movementComponent: Handles movement with animations and collisions. Requires a Position component, Animation component, and a Collision component.
interactionComponent: Handles interaction between entities via the interact event. The onInteract handler is only required on the entity being interacted with. This component requires a Collision Component.
errorFolder: An error occurred while deleting the folder

animation.pickerHint: Select an animation below to start picking frames

borderSolidShorthand.message: border: N solid COLOR — the word "solid" is ignored by RmlUi.
borderSolidShorthand.fix: Use border-width and border-color separately. The border will be solid by default.

borderStyle.message: border-style does not exist in RCSS. RmlUi always renders solid borders.
borderStyle.fix: Remove border-style. Control thickness with border-width and color with border-color.

transition.message: transition is not supported in RmlUi.
transition.fix: Use RmlUi's native animation system (<animation> in RCSS).

animation.message: CSS animation is not supported in RmlUi.
animation.fix: Use RmlUi's @keyframes directive and the animation property in RCSS (different syntax).

boxShadow.message: box-shadow has very limited support in RmlUi (only basic spread and color).
boxShadow.fix: Simplify the box-shadow or use a sibling element with opacity as an alternative.

vwVhUnits.message: vw/vh units have limited support in RmlUi. They may not work in all contexts.
vwVhUnits.fix: Verify in the engine. For fullscreen layouts, width: 100% / height: 100% is usually safer.
